'''Noor R'aya''' was an elderly [[Force-sensitive/Legends|force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
R'aya was born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Sorl]] and was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Having attained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], R'aya was possessed of a deep connection to the Force and decided to leave active duty and the Temple after years of service circa [[52 BBY/Legends|52 BBY]].<ref name="TDR" />

Returning to his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], R'aya established a small home in the [[Cragh Mountains]], and though he maintained his seclusion, the elderly Master kept in contact with the Order. A craftsman, R'aya would create small trinkets and toys in his home and would give them out to the [[Youngling/Legends|children]] of a nearby village every year. In [[43 BBY/Legends|43 BBY]], R'aya stopped returning messages to the Temple, worrying the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Dispatching Jedi to check in on the old Master, they found his home ransacked and no sign of the man. Several weeks later, Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] was taken captive by the [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]. Jinn would later discover that R'aya was being held in the prison facility with him, both now subjects of Arbor's deranged experimentations.<ref name="TDR" />

With the aid of [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], Master [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] discovered that Masters Jinn and R'aya were being held on a secret facility on [[Simpla-12]] and quickly seized the laboratory and prison. Releasing R'aya, Gallia realized he had been drained of a significant amount of blood and was very weak. Unable to evacuate the Master, he was transported offworld by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ona Nobis]] and taken to Zan Arbor's hideout on [[Belasco/Legends|Belasco]]. Feigning unconsciousness, Master R'aya was able to remain alert enough to leave handcrafted toys behind as clues for any Jedi tracking him.<ref name="TDR" />

Indeed it was on Belasco that a recovered Jinn and Gallia were able to locate R'aya and return with him to Coruscant for [[Force healing/Legends|healing]].<ref name="TDR" />
